Product Creation Is The !
EASIEST PART!
This Should NEVER Hold You Back
3 BIG Product Creation Mistakes!
• Mistake #1: Creating the products you want to create!
• Mistake #2: Assuming you know what the market wants!
• Mistake #3: Striving for perfection

-- 1 of 12 --

Generating Product Ideas:
• Prospect Surveys!
• Forums (Pain Points & High-Comment Posts)!
• Trade Publications!
• Magazines!
• ClickBank!
• Jay Abraham Amazon Strategy!
• Amazon Magazines!
• Amazon Books!
• Amazon Kindle Store
Developing Your Product’s Big Idea:
• What is the Product’s HOOK?!
• USP of Product!
• Names Are CRITICAL!!
• Best Products are Evergreen
•Overall & By Section:!
• Step #1: WHAT!
• Step #2: WHY!
• Step #3: HOW TO!
• Step #4: WHAT TO DO NOW
Using A Solid Product Structure:

-- 2 of 12 --

Different Types Of Written Products:
• Digital/Physical Books!
• Short Reports!
• Email/PDF Course!
• Transcripts!
• Interviews Transcribed!
• Tip: Make this like a book (Think and Grow Rich)!
• Start with Private Label/Resale Rights Products!
• Tip: Look for other people’s products in other niches that could
work well in your nice, and approach them
• Public Domain!
• Published before 1923 or between 1923 and 1963,
but not renewed (7% - legal advice)!
• Ebay Books (ebay.com/chp/books)!
• bookscanning.com!
• gutenberg.org!
• Voice Recognition Content!
• Mac built in with Mavericks!
• PC Dragon Naturally Speaking
Different Types Of Written Products:

-- 3 of 12 --

• Articles!
• Swipe File!
• Toolkit!
• Case Studies/Stories!
• Templates!
• Resources!
Creating Compilation Products:
• Directory!
• Cheat Sheets!
• Mindmaps!
• Flow Charts/Process Maps!
• Sticky Forum Posts
When Creating Compilation Products
Always Cite References/Source
EasyBib.com is a simple resource for this.

-- 4 of 12 --

• Streaming/Downloadable !
• Monologue!
• Teleseminar!
• Audio Extraction!
• Interviews!
• Best Practices Interviews!
• Tele-Summit!
• Best Practices Roundtable
Creating Audio Products:

-- 5 of 12 --

• Expert Interviews!
• Amazon (Look for recently published books)!
• Clickbank!
• Radio TV Interview Report (RTIR.com)!
• The Case Study!
• The Voiceover!
• Audio Book!
• CD’s

• Yeti Blue Mic (bluemic.com/yeti/)!

• Adobe Audition!
• Web-Based:!
• Instant Teleseminar (instantteleseminar.com/)

• ScreenFlow - Mac!

• Panasonic Lumix GH2!

• Rode Boom Mic!

Having Products Created For You:
• TaskArmy.com!
• reddit.com/r/ForHire!
• Guru.com!
• Warrior Forum!
• OnlineJobs.ph!
• HubStaff.com
Tip: For Written Products, Go With Native Speakers
• Leverage!
• Repurpose Content (at least 6 times)!
• Blog Post > Videos > Compilation!
• Videos > Audios > Transcripts!
• Transcripts > Blog Posts!
• Blog Posts > Compilation Bonus!
• Prolific!
• “What’s Next?”
Mindset Of An A-Player Info-Marketer:

-- 11 of 12 --

The Marketing Funnel To
Sell The Product Is Where
All The Money Is Made!
